ProjectVersionId.description: The ID of the project version

UserId.description: The ID of the team account

ForceImport.description:
**true** : The errors and alerts will not be shown while importing the spec file          
**false** : The errors and alerts will be shown while importing the spec file

File.description: File path of the spec file

Add API reference request.summary: Import an API reference with projectVersionId, userId and a spec file url or a file type.
